[{"events":[{"event":"show_suggested_content","params":"{\"_staging_flag\":0,\"env\":\"PROD\",\"region\":\"cn\",\"isDevMode\":false,\"isReleaseVersion\":true,\"scmVersion\":\"1.0.4.2270\",\"os\":\"web\",\"os_name\":\"web\",\"web_device\":\"windows\",\"site_type\":\"doubao_site\",\"screen_width\":1440,\"screen_height\":960,\"landing_page_url\":\"https://www.doubao.com/chat/create-image\",\"app_id\":482431,\"biz_user_id\":\"4457858547596963\",\"current_page\":\"chat\",\"previous_page\":\"chat\",\"content_detail\":\"清新灵动的东方意境，暗色调，米色为主，描绘绵延远山与飘渺流云，飞鸟穿梭其间，绿色远山与流云形成层次感，前景森林树木繁茂，仿佛可闻山间风声、水流潺潺的自然诗意。极细手写文字“峰影浮光”，笔画蜿蜒曲折，融合篆体和的风格。3:4\",\"genre\":\"精选\",\"skill_id\":\"3\",\"skill_name\":\"images_generation\",\"show_scene\":\"bottom_bar\",\"event_index\":1774456098640,\"event_name\":\"show_suggested_content\",\"event_ts\":1774455830,\"growth_deepevent\":\"4\",\"url\":\"https://www.doubao.com/chat/38418685537153794\",\"url_path\":\"/chat/38418685537153794\"}","local_time_ms":1774455830758,"is_bav":0,"session_id":"b9757c11-9159-4d2c-9511-7d544d09a57b"},{"event":"show_suggested_content","params":"{\"_staging_flag\":0,\"env\":\"PROD\",\"region\":\"cn\",\"isDevMode\":false,\"isReleaseVersion\":true,\"scmVersion\":\"1.0.4.2270\",\"os\":\"web\",\"os_name\":\"web\",\"web_device\":\"windows\",\"site_type\":\"doubao_site\",\"screen_width\":1440,\"screen_height\":960,\"landing_page_url\":\"https://www.doubao.com/chat/create-image\",\"app_id\":482431,\"biz_user_id\":\"4457858547596963\",\"current_page\":\"chat\",\"previous_page\":\"chat\",\"content_detail\":\"胶片风格，一只可爱的猫，戴着蓝色贝雷帽和浅蓝色围巾，捧着一束闪闪发光的浅蓝色玫瑰，双眼清澈，瞳孔很大。细节丰富，画面逼真，阴影柔和。宝丽来照片，老照片，胶片滤镜。\",\"genre\":\"精选\",\"skill_id\":\"3\",\"skill_name\":\"images_generation\",\"show_scene\":\"bottom_bar\",\"event_index\":1774456098639,\"event_name\":\"show_suggested_content\",\"event_ts\":1774455830,\"growth_deepevent\":\"4\",\"url\":\"https://www.doubao.com/chat/38418685537153794\",\"url_path\":\"/chat/38418685537153794\"}","local_time_ms":177445583075 e\":\"show_suggested_content\",\"event_ts\":1774455830,\"growth_deepevent\":\"4\",\"url\":\"https://www.doubao.com/chat/38418685537153794\",\"url_path\":\"/chat/38418685537153794\"}","local_time_ms":1774455830757,"is_bav":0,"session_id":"b9757c11-9159-4d2c-9511-7d544d09a57b"},{"event":"show_suggested_content","params":"{\"_staging_flag\":0,\"env\":\"PROD\",\"region\":\"cn\",\"isDevMode\":false,\"isReleaseVersion\":true,\"scmVersion\":\"1.0.4.2270\",\"os\":\"web\",\"os_name\":\"web\",\"web_device\":\"windows\",\"site_type\":\"doubao_site\",\"screen_width\":1440,\"screen_height\":960,\"landing_page_url\":\"https://www.doubao.com/chat/create-image\",\"app_id\":482431,\"biz_user_id\":\"4457858547596963\",\"current_page\":\"chat\",\"previous_page\":\"chat\",\"content_detail\":\"大面积留白，雾蓝宣纸背景，极简构图。一条曲折的木栈道作为画面唯一主体，两侧大面积留白占比至少70%，形成强烈视觉压迫感。工笔水墨淡彩画风格，极细毫笔认真勾勒。栈道呈现海边市集：渔夫、挑担卖贝壳的小贩、推手推车的人、卖风筝的小摊、街头小乐师与围观的人、炊烟与茶汽、海鸥、猫、孩子追逐泡泡。人间烟火，趣味十足。合适位置盖一枚朱红篆书印章“海边闲事”。3:4\",\"genre\":\"精选\",\"skill_id\":\"3\",\
